data.title: KOIL Energy Solutions (OTCQB: KLNG) to release Q2 2025 earnings report on Aug 14, 2025, in Houston.  Form 10-Q filing scheduled.
data.description: In Houston on August 8, 2025, Koil Energy Solutions, Inc. (OTCQB: KLNG) disclosed its plan to submit the Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the second quarter of 2025 by August 14, 2025.

data.title: Destiny Tech100 Inc. (NYSE: DXYZ) reports Q2 2025 results: NAV $6.92 per share (previously $6.31), investment portfolio value $76.8 million.
data.description: Destiny Tech100 Inc. (NYSE: DXYZ) released its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company reported a net asset value (NAV) of $6.92 per common stock share, a notable increase from $6.31 per share in the previous quarter. As of June 30, 2025, Destiny Tech100's investment portfolio held a total fair value of around $76.8 million, which encompassed short-term investments. The fund retains various positions in privately-held technology companies.

data.title: ATS to join Raymond James Industrial Showcase on Aug 13, 2025. Executives to meet investors virtually. Contact akapur2@atsautomation.com for meetings.
data.description: ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) based in Cambridge, Ontario, shared that Ryan McLeod, currently serving as the Interim Chief Executive Officer, and Anne Cybulski, the Interim Chief Financial Officer, will take part in the virtual Raymond James Industrial Showcase scheduled for August 13, 2025. The Management team is set to engage in institutional investor meetings during the event, and appointments can be coordinated by reaching out to a Raymond James representative or emailing at akapur2@atsautomation.com. ATS Corporation, a key player in the industry, is keen on participating actively in such events to connect with potential investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Shift4 will partake in August 12th Investor Conference and September 10th chat; focus on integrated payments and technology.
data.description: In Center Valley, Pennsylvania, Shift4 (NYSE: FOUR), a key player in integrated payments and commerce technology, shared plans to engage in upcoming investor conferences. On August 12, 2025, they will take part in a fireside chat as part of the virtual 2025 Susquehanna Get Carded Conference at 12:00PM ET. This will be an opportunity for stakeholders to interact with management directly through one-on-one and small group meetings. Another fireside chat featuring management is scheduled for September 10, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase CFO Alesia Haas to speak at Oppenheimer conference on August 13, 2025, at 10:15 a.m. PT. Webcast available.
data.description: Alesia Haas, the Chief Financial Officer of Coinbase Global, Inc., is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Oppenheimer 28th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 13, 2025, at 10:15 a.m. PT / 1:15 p.m. ET. Those interested can access a live webcast and replay of the session on Coinbase’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.coinbase.com. This announcement comes as the company continues its commitment to transparency and investor communication.

data.title: Lucara Diamond Corp. reports Q2 2025 revenue of $43.7 million, fueled by sale of a 1,094 carat diamond for $12 million. The company also recovered a 2,036 carat diamond in July 2025. Operating margins were 65%, and cash balance was $22.7 million with $220.0 million drawn for projects. Going concern assessment indicates potential financial challenges. For more details, read the full article on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Lucara Diamond Corp. reported its Q2 2025 results, with revenue increasing to $43.7 million, up from $41.3 million in Q2 2024. The company sold a 1,094 carat diamond for $12.0 million and recovered a 2,036 carat diamond, the second-largest ever in Botswana. They recovered a total of 85,024 carats, with 15 stones over 100 carats. Operating margins were 65%, with operating costs per tonne processed at $26.76. They funded the Cost Overrun Reserve Account ($61.7 million) and still have a cash balance of $22.7 million. However, they have a working capital deficit of $156.4 million due to loan classification. Lucara faces financial challenges due to non-compliance with financial covenants. They continue development on the Karowe underground project and are seeking additional financing. The diamond market outlook remains cautious, with lab-grown diamonds affecting prices. Lucara is optimistic about the recovery of the Chinese diamond market. Karowe's underground project is progressing well, with significant developments in shaft sinking and lateral development. They achieved 2,000 lost-time injury-free days and spent $13.6 million on project activities in Q2 2025. Operating indices were maintained throughout the quarter. Activities for Q3 2025 include further development on ventilation and production shafts, as well as infrastructure progress. Overall, Lucara Diamond Corp. is facing financial challenges but remains committed to fully realizing the potential of their operations.

data.title: Soluna Holdings' CFO John Tunison resigns to join another company. Effective August 21st. $SLNH #SLNH
data.description: Albany, New York - Soluna Holdings, Inc. (“Soluna” or the “Company”), a developer of green data centers for intensive computing applications like Bitcoin mining and AI, has confirmed the resignation of Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer John Tunison effective August 21st. Tunison is leaving Soluna to take on a comparable role at a privately held firm. Under his guidance, Soluna has achieved significant progress. The NASDAQ-listed company is now seeking a replacement to continue its growth trajectory in the sector.

data.title: Avalon Holdings Corp. (NYSE Amex: AWX) reports $20.3M in Q2 2025 revenue, down from $23.1M in Q2 2024.
data.description: In Warren, Ohio, on August 8, 2025, Avalon Holdings Corporation (NYSE Amex: AWX) disclosed its financial performance for Q2 of 2025. Reportedly, the net operating revenues for this quarter stood at $20.3 million, experiencing a decline from $23.1 million recorded in the same period last year. The company did not disclose further details regarding its financial status in the provided snippet.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. reported Q2 results, declared $1.00 per share dividend, payable on October 10, 2025.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Constellation Software Inc. (TSX:CSU) released its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company declared a dividend of $1.00 per share for all common shareholders as of September 19, 2025, with the payout scheduled for October 10, 2025. This dividend is classified as an eligible dividend under the Income Tax Act (Canada). All monetary figures mentioned in the announcement are in U.S. Dollars, unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Ashland Inc. (NYSE: ASH) authorizes quarterly dividend of $0.415/share, payable on Sept 15, 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on August 8, 2025, the board of directors of Ashland Inc. (NYSE: ASH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.415 per share for the company's common stock. Shareholders as of September 1, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 15, 2025.

data.title: TELA Bio granted 10,200 restricted stock units to 14 new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) as inducement.
data.description: TELA Bio, Inc., headquartered in Malvern, disclosed on August 8, 2025, that it granted 10,200 restricted stock units of its common stock to fourteen newly recruited employees. The grants were approved by the Compensation Committee of TELA Bio's Board of Directors on August 5, 2025. These inducement grants were made in accordance with the Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) exception and were seen as crucial incentives for the employees to join TELA Bio.

data.title: Rubicon Organics to report Q2 2025 financial results on Aug. 18, 2025 for three and six months ended June 30, 2025. TSXV: ROMJ, OTCQX: ROMJF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 8, 2025, Rubicon Organics Inc. (TSXV: ROMJ) (OTCQX: ROMJF), a licensed producer specializing in organic certified and premium cannabis products, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on Monday, August 18, 2025. The report will cover the three and six months ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Lexin's revenue hits RMB 3.59B (up 15.6% QoQ) with RMB 670M profit in Q2 2025 as transactions surge, marking 5 straight profitable quarters.
data.description: Shenzhen, China, August 8, 2025 - Lexin, the leading new-consumption digital technology service provider in China, reported its unaudited financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on August 7, 2025. The revenue for the quarter stood at RMB 3.59 billion, showing a 15.6% increase quarter-over-quarter (QoQ). The profit, measured as Non-GAAP EBIT, was RMB 670 million, up 15.2% QoQ and a significant 116.4% year-over-year (YoY) growth. This marks the highest Q2 profit in 14 quarters and represents the fifth consecutive quarter of sequential growth. The company's core business indicators also demonstrated ongoing improvement during this period.
